basics.name: Abhinav Khanna
basics.summary: B.Tech Computer Science student at IIT Delhi working on machine learning, robotics, AI safety, systems, and vision-language models. U.S. Citizen.

work.name: SRI International
work.summary: Fine-tuned large language models for portfolio management using DPO and GRPO, with DPO achieving a 20.3% profit margin over a three-month evaluation window; introduced risk-sensitive preference orderings and developed multi-agent and ensemble extensions. Work in preparation for publication.

work.name: Wipro AI, Lab45
work.summary: Developed deep learning and NLP systems for insurance claim processing across noisy claim documents, including claim classification, claim-validity prediction, RAG integration, and supporting preprocessing/evaluation scripts.

portfolio.name: Semantic Safety Aware Planning
portfolio.description: Hierarchical VLM and DWA planning in an options-over-MDP formulation for semantically safe navigation; uses risk-inducing objects as grounded visual context and links the undergraduate thesis.

portfolio.name: Counterfactual Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models
portfolio.description: Dataset and benchmark for evaluating VLA models on counterfactual reasoning tasks grounded in Pearl's causal hierarchy; under double-blind review at NeurIPS 2026.

portfolio.name: HindiLM
portfolio.description: Byte-level BPE tokenizer and decoder-only Hindi language model built from basic PyTorch modules with RoPE and GQA; achieved 4.56 compression ratio, 0.38 long-tail score, and 2.42 bits per character.

portfolio.name: Object Clearance Planner
portfolio.description: PyBullet control for camera-guided Franka Emika pick-and-place, using fifth-degree polynomial trajectories and visual feedback for target accessibility.

portfolio.name: Backdoor Attacks on Open-Vocabulary Object Detectors
portfolio.description: Robustness study of Grounding DINO under image-space prompt-tuning triggers and CoCoOp-style prompt modifications.

portfolio.name: Linux Kernel Development
portfolio.description: Gang scheduling class and block device driver with caching, write monitoring, and instrumentation for kernel-level I/O behavior.

portfolio.name: Anamorphic Encryption
portfolio.description: Systematization of knowledge for cryptographic schemes operating under violated sender-freedom and receiver-privacy assumptions.
